purpose: SaaS and software rationalization platform that aggregates data from multiple sources (Workday, AuditBoard, Entra ID, voluntary submissions) to analyze application usage, cost, and adoption — then uses AI to recommend keep/cut/replace/consolidate decisions with evidence-based justification
features: Dashboard with total apps under review, total spend, avg adoption rate, AI recommendation breakdown
Application portfolio list with search, filter by category/status/recommendation
App detail pages with usage stats, cost per user, adoption rates, trend data
Decision workflow: department head submits recommendation with justification, IT/finance reviews
Data source management showing sync status for Workday, AuditBoard, Entra ID
Category management (Productivity, Security, DevOps, HR, Finance, Collaboration, Analytics, Communication, Project Management, Infrastructure)
100+ mock apps seeded with realistic usage, cost, and adoption data

users.description: IT Asset Management team, Finance team, Department Heads, and leadership reviewing the company's software portfolio

roles.name: Super Admin
roles.description: Full system access including user/role management

roles.name: Admin
roles.description: IT Asset Management — manages app portfolio, data sources, reviews decisions

roles.name: Finance Reviewer
roles.description: Reviews cost data, approves/rejects financial decisions on apps

roles.name: Department Head
roles.description: Submits recommendations for apps in their department, provides justification

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to dashboards and app details

ai_features.description: AI recommendations are seeded as mock data for now; real AI integration is a future TODO

special_features: 100+ seeded mock applications with realistic data

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Overview metrics, spend breakdown, recommendation summary

pages.name: Applications
pages.description: Full app portfolio list with filters

pages.name: App Detail
pages.description: Individual app usage, cost, adoption, recommendations

pages.name: Decisions
pages.description: Decision log with approval status tracking

pages.name: Data Sources
pages.description: Integration status for Workday, AuditBoard, Entra ID

pages.name: Submissions
pages.description: Voluntary app usage submissions from employees

skipped_guardrails.ai_prompt_management: AI recommendations are seeded as mock data; real AI provider integration deferred to future iteration
skipped_guardrails.nemo_guardrails: No live AI features in initial build
skipped_guardrails.terraform: No cloud deployment target selected yet
